name: Facility Site Plan and SDS Attachments Configuration
description: The Green Valley Water Facility must include its updated site map and chemical Safety Data Sheets (SDS) in its annual Tier II submission for emergency responders. Using the EPA Tier2 Submit application (already open), import the baseline facility data from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Tasks\green_valley_baseline.t2s. Navigate to the facility's Attachments section. You must add two file attachments: 1) Browse to and attach C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Documents\SitePlan_2025.pdf and set its Attachment Type to 'Site Plan' (or the closest equivalent Map type) with a description of '2025 Site Map'. 2) Browse to and attach C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Documents\Toluene_SDS.pdf and set its Attachment Type to 'Safety Data Sheet (SDS)' with a description of 'Toluene SDS'. After adding both attachments successfully to the facility record, save and export the final submission to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Output\submission_with_attachments.t2s.
